title: Ophrys sphegodes lusus peralba
taxonomy: Ophrys sphegodes lusus peralba is considered a subspecies of the bee orchid (Ophrys sphegodes). It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and the genus Ophrys. This orchid is native to the Mediterranean region and is known for its unique appearance, which resembles a female bee. As a member of the orchid family, Ophrys sphegodes lusus peralba has characteristics that are common to the family, such as its flowering habit and seed production. The classification of Ophrys sphegodes lusus peralba is based on its distinct morphological features and geographical distribution.
